---
title: "Vine Copulas for Multivariate Dependence"
format:
  html:
    grid:
      body-width: 800px
---

::: {.callout-note}
Slides for this session will be posted shortly before the course.
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Speaker" icon=false}
[**Judith Claassen**](../../about.qmd#judith-claassen) | Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam | [![ORCID iD](https://orcid.org/sites/default/files/images/orcid_16x16.png)](https://orcid.org/0009-0000-2979-1297){target="_blank"} [![GitHub](https://github.githubassets.com/favicons/favicon.png){height="16px"}](https://github.com/judithclaassen){target="_blank"} [![](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/icons/globe2.svg){height="16px"}](https://research.vu.nl/en/persons/judith-claassen/){target="_blank"}
:::

## Overview

This presentation covers the use of copulas for modelling multivariate dependencies
between the variables involved in compound and extreme events, organised around three
areas:

- **Copula foundations**, including Sklar's theorem and how copulas separate marginal
  distributions from the dependence structure, and the main bivariate copula families
  used to capture symmetric, asymmetric, and tail-dependent relationships

- **Vine copulas for higher dimensions**, including the pair-copula construction that
  builds multivariate models from bivariate building blocks, the tree structure of
  regular vines, and the C-vine and D-vine subclasses

- **Applications to extreme events**, including random and conditional sampling from
  fitted copulas, and their use in characterising the joint occurrence of hazards and
  drivers for compound event analysis

## Setup

You need **Python 3.10+** and the [`vinecopulas`](https://github.com/VU-IVM/VineCopulas) package (pip is included with Python). Install the dependencies:

```bash
pip install vinecopulas notebook "pandas<2.2" "numpy<1.27" "matplotlib<3.9"
```

Then launch Jupyter and open the notebook files:

```bash
jupyter notebook
```

## Notebooks

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Part 1: Bivariate Copulas**

:page_facing_up: [View rendered jupyter notebook](bivariatecopulas.html)

:arrow_down: [Download bivariatecopulas.ipynb](https://github.com/egu26-compound-events-sc/egu26-compound-events-sc.github.io/blob/main/materials/03-vine-copulas/bivariatecopulas.ipynb)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Part 2: Vine Copulas**

:page_facing_up: [View rendered jupyter notebook](vinecopulas.html)

:arrow_down: [Download vinecopulas.ipynb](https://github.com/egu26-compound-events-sc/egu26-compound-events-sc.github.io/blob/main/materials/03-vine-copulas/vinecopulas.ipynb)
:::
:::

## Slides

*Slides will be posted shortly before the course.*
